name: Climate FieldView Precision Agriculture API
what_it_does: Climate FieldView (The Climate Corporation, Bayer) precision agriculture REST API for farm field data, seed performance analytics, and agronomic decision support. Enables AI agents to manage field boundary and field data management for precision agriculture workflow, handle planting population and seed variety data for agronomic analytics, access yield map data and harvest analytics for crop performance intelligence, retrieve weather and soil data overlays for agronomic decision support, manage machine telemetry and equipment data integration for precision farming automation, handle field activity recording and agronomic event logging for farm data capture, access seeding prescription and variable rate application for precision input management, retrieve field imagery and NDVI vegetation index data for crop monitoring, manage agronomic trial design and seed performance analysis for variety selection, and integrate FieldView with farm equipment (John Deere, CNH, AGCO), agronomic retailers, and farm management systems.
use_cases: Analyzing yield performance from crop analytics agents
Managing field data from precision agriculture agents
Monitoring crop conditions from field imagery agents
Optimizing seed placement from agronomic prescription agents
not_for: Non-grain crop production without precision ag technology
Specialty crop operations without commercial field scale
Livestock operations without crop production component
best_when: A commercial grain farmer, agronomic retailer, or precision agriculture technology company using FieldView wanting AI agents to automate field data management, yield analytics, crop monitoring, seeding prescription generation, and agronomic decision support.
avoid_when: FARMER DATA PRIVACY AND OWNERSHIP: FieldView farmer data is subject to the American Farm Bureau's Privacy and Security Principles for Farm Data; automated data sharing with third parties requires explicit farmer consent; unauthorized sharing of farmer field data creates farm data privacy violation and trust destruction. Bayer/Monsanto data practices scrutiny — Climate Corporation is a Bayer/Monsanto subsidiary; farmer concerns about data being used for proprietary seed research or crop insurance underwriting create significant political and trust risk for automated data workflows; review data use agreements carefully. Seed recommendation conflict of interest — automated seed variety recommendations using FieldView data that preferentially recommend Bayer/DEKALB/Asgrow seed varieties without neutral comparison creates seed dealer bias and farmer trust issues. USDA program record accuracy — automated FieldView field activity records used for USDA FSA program compliance must match FSA acreage reports; discrepancies create program payment risk.

auth.notes: Climate FieldView uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. The Climate Corporation founded 2006, acquired by Monsanto (2013) for $1.1B, Bayer acquired Monsanto (2018). Bayer AG subsidiary. 40M+ acres on platform. Largest precision agriculture data platform. John Deere, CNH, AGCO equipment integration. Competes with Granular (Corteva), Conservis, and Farmers Edge for precision agriculture data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free basic tier; paid FieldView Plus for advanced analytics and API access
pricing.notes: San Francisco. Bayer AG subsidiary (via Monsanto acquisition 2013/2018). Founded 2006. 40M+ acres. Largest precision ag platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; large field data transfers may be async

known_agent_gotchas: FARMER DATA OWNERSHIP AND CONSENT: FieldView farmer data belongs to the farmer per AFBF Privacy Principles; automated data sharing with agronomic retailers, crop advisors, or third parties requires explicit farmer written consent; unauthorized sharing creates farm data trust violation and potential legal liability

Bayer seed recommendation neutrality — automated agronomic recommendations using FieldView yield data must not preferentially recommend Bayer-owned seed brands (DEKALB, Asgrow, Credenz) without neutral multi-brand comparison; Bayer ownership creates seed recommendation conflict of interest scrutiny

Equipment telematics data latency — automated machine data from John Deere, CNH, and AGCO equipment has variable sync latency (real-time to daily); automated precision prescription workflows must account for equipment connectivity gaps in rural fields

Field boundary accuracy — automated field activity attribution relies on accurate field boundary data; automated workflows must validate field boundaries before precision application prescription generation
Large file transfer for yield maps — yield map data files are large (GB per field); automated yield data retrieval must implement streaming or chunked download with bandwidth management
Seasonal data volume spikes — FieldView usage spikes dramatically during planting and harvest; automated workflows must implement rate limit headroom during peak agricultural calendar
agent_readiness.security_notes: Precision agriculture. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US. Farm field and agronomic data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Precision agriculture. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US. Farm field data and precision ag data.
